reconciliation.horizontal: The initial full-sheet vote split 1:1:1. A fresh single-model local-grid recheck produced a unanimous three-reviewer pass, matching rendered eye/head control signs.
reconciliation.vertical: All full-sheet reviewers passed; the focused recheck also unanimously confirmed the randomized vertical pair.
reconciliation.integrity: Both review rounds found no eye, goggle, face, or large-hair separation.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: corrected eye local-axis interpretation before final rerender
